hooks.command:
STATE=$(head -40 .planning/STATE.md 2>/dev/null || echo ''); LATEST=$(ls -t .planning/notes/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); NOTES=$(cat "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -z "$STATE$NOTES" ] && exit 0; printf '## Circles iOS — Auto-loaded Project Context

### Current State
%s

### Session Re-entry Note (%s)
%s' "$STATE" "$LATEST" "$NOTES" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: .}}'
